Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kral]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Sandvipers refer to Kral as the young chief.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Kral is the young chief of the Sandvipers and the future Sandviper chief.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Kral wears fine black furs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Kral has a green serpent on his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Kral uses awls with heavy green-light gleaming spikes as weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Kral is a prince.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Kral is a member of the Sandvipers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Kral uses awls that crawl with corrosive green madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Kral will never make it past Truegold without extreme good fortune.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Kral is at the Highgold level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Kral is the son of the Sandviper sect chief.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Kral uses awls as weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Kral is a Highgold of the Sandvipers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Kral has an Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Kral is a character.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Kral was killed by an Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Kral's killer was taken to the Blackflame Empire and sheltered by a young Underlord.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Kral was stabbed in the back by an Iron child with a hidden weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long wants to take revenge for Kral.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
